title: stenocalyx laxus
intro: Stenocalyx laxus is a plant species that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the citrus family. It is a shrub native to tropical regions of Central and South America, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Stenocalyx laxus include its ability to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory problems. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
